link_info.banner: TI ARM Clang Linker PC v4.0.4.LTS
link_info.command_line: C:\ti\ccs2051\ccs\tools\compiler\ti-cgt-armllvm_4.0.4.LTS\bin\tiarmlnk -IC:\ti\ccs2051\ccs\tools\compiler\ti-cgt-armllvm_4.0.4.LTS\lib -o xiaochexunji duoquan.out -mxiaochexunji duoquan.map -iC:/ti/mspm0_sdk_2_10_00_04/source -iC:/Users/Administrator/workspace_ccstheia/xiaochexunji duoquan -iC:/Users/Administrator/workspace_ccstheia/xiaochexunji duoquan/Debug/syscfg -iC:/ti/ccs2051/ccs/tools/compiler/ti-cgt-armllvm_4.0.4.LTS/lib --diag_wrap=off --display_error_number --warn_sections --xml_link_info=xiaochexunji duoquan_linkInfo.xml --rom_model ./empty.o ./ti_msp_dl_config.o ./startup_mspm0g350x_ticlang.o ./hlk_as201.o -l./device_linker.cmd -ldevice.cmd.genlibs -llibc.a --start-group -llibc++.a -llibc++abi.a -llibc.a -llibsys.a -llibsysbm.a -llibclang_rt.builtins.a -llibclang_rt.profile.a --end-group --cg_opt_level=2
link_info.title: Link successful
